title: Transfer of Powers and Duties (The Chief Medical Officer, Ministry of Health) Notice, 1973
title_en: Transfer of Powers and Duties (The Chief Medical Officer, Ministry of Health) Notice, 1973

provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Transfer of Powers and Duties (The Chief Medical Officer, Ministry of Health) Notice.
The functions conferred upon the Chief Medical Officer, Ministry of Health under the Written Laws specified in the First Schedule hereto, shall be exercised by the Director of Hospital Services.
The functions conferred upon the Chief Medical Officer, Ministry of Health, under the Written Laws specified in the Second Schedule hereto, shall be exercised by the Director of Preventive Services.

The functions conferred upon the Chief Medical Officer, Ministry of Health, under the Written Laws specified in the Third Schedule hereto, shall be exercised by the Director of Manpower Development. First Schedule Food and Drugs Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 93 ). Dangerous Drugs Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 95 ). Mental Diseases Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 98 ). Workmen's Compensation Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 263 ). Pharmacy and Poisons Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 416). Second Schedule Infectious Diseases Ordinance (R.L. Cap. 96 ). Third Schedule Nurses and Midwives Registration Ordinance (R.E. Cap. 325 ). Medical Practitioners and Dentists Ordinance (R.E. Cap. 152 ).
